subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Aug. 1912 in Dublin, NH
subcodes.first_line: The mature wisdom requires this. I must go everywhere and raise the call of the Kingdom.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wisdom [hikmat]
